title: Cooper Richey
compiled_truth: Cooper Richey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-05 to 2002-02-21), Cooper Richey sent 372 and received 311 emails, totalling 683 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jhawker](people/jhawker-petersco) (101), [Colin Tip](people/colin-tip) (23), [Epurtzki](people/epurtzki-deloitte) (16), [Tim Heizenrader](people/tim-heizenrader) (12), [Chris Wiebe](people/chris-wiebe) (10). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, calendar, contacts, fundamentals, inbox, personal.
